channel.title: Releases on Agilebase docs
channel.description: Recent content in Releases on Agilebase docs

item.title: 17th May 2026 - more UI improvements, storage changes and coming up
item.description:
Pinning persistence

Last month’s release of the ability for users to pin views (i.e. keep favourite views permanently and easily accessible) went down well with customers and we had some great feedback.

One request was to keep pinned views around between logins and other events, like platform upgrades. That’s now done.

Reminder - To pin a view, simply open in and click the pushpin icon at the top left. Then it will stick to the sidebar on the homepage, so you can click it to get back to it at any time. It will also appear at the top if you click the magnifying glass ‘search’ icon in the top toolbar.

item.title: 3rd April 2026 - pinning views and other improvements
item.description:
Last month’s release had some major improvements for developers, this one has some big benefits for everyone.

View pinning

Often, people have a favourite set of views that they frequently use. You can now ‘pin’ those to the sidebar for easy access with one click, wherever you are in the system.

To pin a view, simply click the pin icon to the left of the view name, when a view is open.
